name: Freight Bridge Cleanup Services - Iowa City
tagline: Post-Construction Cleanup for Iowa City Data Centers
slogan: Commissioning-Ready Handoffs for Iowa's Data Centers
description: Freight Bridge Cleanup Services handles post-construction cleanup for data center projects in the Iowa City corridor. After the trades wrap up, we come in with our box truck, haul off the construction debris, and sweep out the building so it's ready for commissioning. A division of Freight Bridge LLC.

hours.displayText: Mon-Fri 6AM-6PM | Sat by appointment | Sun Closed

brand.logoAlt: Freight Bridge Cleanup Services Iowa City Logo
